description: GPA 90 of 100 Graduate of SMK Negeri 7 Semarang (2019–2023), majoring in Power Electronics and Communication Engineering. Equipped with a solid foundation in industrial power systems, electronic circuit design, and communication networks, developed through rigorous 4-year vocational training and practical project experiences.

GPA 3.58 of 4.00 Engineering student/graduate from Politeknik Negeri Semarang, majoring in Electronics Engineering Technology. Possesses a strong foundation in practical electronics hardware design, industrial automation system development, and microcontrollers, backed by intense hands-on vocational training and technical project executions.
